title: Sleep  Vote
description: Skip the night democratically:  Sleep Vote replaces the vanilla sleep mechanic with a server-wide voting system. Right click a bed at night to start a vote, and if the majority agrees, the night is skipped for everyone.
body:
# Sleep Vote

**Vote to skip the night.**

Sleep Vote replaces the vanilla sleep mechanic with a community vote system. Instead of needing a majority of players to physically sleep in beds, anyone can trigger a vote and let the server decide democratically whether to skip the night.


## How It Works

When a player right-clicks a bed during the night, a server-wide vote is automatically started. All players have **15 seconds** to cast their vote. If more than half of the server votes yes, the night is skipped instantly.


## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/sleep yes` | Vote to skip the night |
| `/sleep no` | Vote to keep the night |


## Vote Rules

- A vote is triggered automatically when a player interacts with a bed at night
- Players can only vote once per vote
- The vote passes if at least half of all online players voted yes
- If the vote fails, the night continues as normal


## Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.11
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Required:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
